description_for_human: Create and manage Outlook calendar events
description_for_model: Create Outlook calendar appointments for volunteer food bank visits

functions.name: createEvent
functions.description: Create a calendar appointment for the volunteer's food bank visit

subject.description: The subject/title of the calendar event

startDateTime.description: Start timestamp in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS with timezone offset. MUST use this exact format, e.g. 2026-03-29T10:00:00+01:00

endDateTime.description: End timestamp in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS with timezone offset. MUST use this exact format, e.g. 2026-03-29T11:00:00+01:00

location.description: The plain text address of the location, e.g. "Sutton Coldfield Baptist Church, Trinity Hill, Sutton Coldfield, West Midlands, B72 1TA"

isOnlineMeeting.description: Whether to create a Teams online meeting. MUST be set to false for in-person food bank visits.

body.description:
JSON string representing the event body with contentType and content properties. contentType MUST be "HTML". Example: {"contentType": "HTML", "content": "

Event details

"}

attendeeEmails.description: Array of attendee email addresses. Pass an empty array [] as the organiser is already added automatically.
